# HomeGearWise.com — LLMs.txt
#
# Purpose: help AI assistants/crawlers understand this site and its preferred usage.
# Contact: contact@homegearwise.com
#
# This site publishes editorial comparison guides and maintenance checklists for home & garden products.
# Some outbound links are affiliate links (Amazon Associate).
#
# Preferred attribution when quoting:
# - “HomeGearWise.com” + the page URL
#
# Languages
# - English: /
# - Français: /fr/
# - Español: /es/
# - Deutsch: /de/
#
# Key sections
# - Robot vacuums & mops: /robot-vacuum-mop-comparison/ (and translations)
# - Automatic coffee machines: /automatic-coffee-machines/ (and translations)
# - Airfryers: /airfryers/ (and translations)
# - Blog: /blog/ (and translations)
#
# Policies
# - Legal notice: /legal-notice/
# - Privacy policy: /privacy-policy/
